metaTitle: Image Crop — Free Online Photo Cropper (Private & High Quality)
metaDescription: Crop your images instantly in your browser. Use presets for Instagram, YouTube, and more. 100% private — your photos never leave your device. No registration required.

howto.description: Click the upload area or drag and drop your photo (JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF). Your file stays securely on your device throughout the process.
Drag the corners of the crop box to select the area you want to keep. You can also move the entire box to center your subject.
Choose from standard ratios like 1:1 (Square), 16:9 (Widescreen), or 4:5 (Portrait) to match social media requirements perfectly.
Once satisfied, click 'Crop Image' to process. Your perfectly framed photo will be ready for instant download.

why: 100% private — your images are processed locally and never uploaded to any server
Popular aspect ratio presets for Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, and LinkedIn
Free-form cropping for custom dimensions and unique framing
Maintains original image quality — no unnecessary re-compression
Works seamlessly on all devices, including smartphones and tablets
Completely free with no watermarks and no file size limits
Perfect for creating profile pictures, social media posts, and thumbnails

faq.q: Is my personal photo safe when cropping here?
faq.a: Yes. This tool uses client-side processing, meaning your photos stay inside your browser. No data is ever sent to a server, providing the highest level of privacy for your personal images.

faq.q: What aspect ratio should I use for Instagram?
faq.a: For standard feed posts, use 1:1 (Square). For portrait posts, 4:5 is ideal. For Stories, Reels, and IGTV, the 9:16 vertical ratio is recommended. These presets are available in the tool.

faq.q: Will cropping my image reduce its quality?
faq.a: No. Cropping simply discards the pixels outside your selected area. The pixels within the crop box retain their original quality and sharpness without additional compression.

faq.q: What is the best crop for profile pictures?
faq.a: Most platforms (like WhatsApp, LinkedIn, or Twitter) use a 1:1 square ratio for profile pictures, which they then display as circles or squares. Using the 1:1 preset ensures your face stays centered.

faq.q: Can I rotate the image while cropping?
faq.a: This tool is specialized for precise cropping. If you need to fix a tilted photo, we recommend using our 'Image Rotate' tool first, then coming back here to crop it to the perfect size.

faq.q: Can I undo or reset my crop settings?
faq.a: Yes! You can adjust the crop box as many times as you like before clicking the download button. If you've already saved it, just reload the original file to start over.
